name: Opalmeadow
personality: This woolly-capped capybara's star-shaped eyes miss nothing — its git history looks like abstract expressionism. Downside: Opalmeadow treats bug reports as suggestions. Upside: other tools relax in its presence; even eslint grows gentle.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
